rustconchat: Ring buffer of last 100 chat + event messages
Served over RCON for app backfill
Logs global chat, team chat, connects, disconnects
misfitsui: Shared UI + image asset library for all plugins
Neon underground color palette as static constants
Branded panels, toasts, buttons, skull icons
misfitscommands: Browse chat commands, console commands, permissions, skin IDs
Cyberpunk UI v4 with collapsible sidebar and detail drawer
Per-command permission filtering with admin bypass
Favorites system with persistent data file
Plugin-grouped file tree with search and paging
dev2discord: Bridges Rust devblog RSS feed to Discord webhook
Individual or daily digest posting modes
Keyword allowlist, blacklist, and role-ping filters
First-run backfill skip and seen-GUID memory
Custom embed color, username, avatar, footer
airbags: Large Backpack acts as oxygen tank underwater
Compact O2 HUD shown only when relevant
Configurable drain rate and max air reserves
Craft conversion from diving tank supported
alwaysstocked: NPC vending machines hold huge default stock
Admin command restocks all vendors instantly
boatnitro: Shift-to-boost for rowboat, RHIB, PT, tugboat
Separate water and air boost multipliers
Unified manual-eject for driver and passengers
helinitro: Sprint-key nitro for minicopter, scrap, attack heli
Optional velocity impulse and effect prefab
horsegun: Custom skin fires live horses as projectiles
Configurable launch speed and upward arc
Auto-cleanup of corpses after configurable seconds
c4guns: Explosive 5.56 launches timed C4 on fire
Configurable fuse time and launch speed
chickengun: Full-auto chicken launcher with skin ID gate
Physics-driven chickens with AI disabled mid-flight
Hover protection and configurable landing modes
Per-player and global active chicken caps
Configurable launch speed and bounce behavior
sharkgun: MP5 skin fires SimpleSharks via projectile carrier
Sharks swim on water entry, die on ground impact
Full-auto fire with bullet damage cancelled
Per-player and global active shark caps
betterarmorinsert: Custom armor insert plates with damage-type scaling
Configurable destruction chance when moved to clothes
Crate spawn configuration per insert type
Harmony patches for clean item behavior
chickenlover: Adds Chicken Lover button to Chicken Coop UI
Satisfies only chickens in the coop being looted
Heal to full and fill needs to full options
Configurable scan radius and prefab list
compostsplitter: Splits compostables evenly across open slots
Blocks adding when composter is full
Persists stack layout across server restarts
deadmanslocker: Loot button on your own corpse for instant retrieval
Optional exact layout restore from snapshot
deepseaspeed: Speed boost and nitro for modular boats
Shift-key nitro with fuel cost per burst
VIP tier with unlimited nitro and max speed
Separate perms for boost, speed, nitro, flip
eatall: Toggleable EAT ALL button consumes every food item
Applies cumulative stat buffs in one click
Include belt and wear slots optionally
Custom anchor, colors, text, font size
entcount: Counts Rust entities owned by online or offline players
List command with query and limit
Cache layer avoids repeated full scans
entitylimiter: Caps owned entities per player using four tiers
Configurable default limit for ungranted players
Chat command shows current count and limit
Optional full recount on plugin load
flyingfish: Periodic ocean event spawns leaping shark cluster
Configurable count, radius, jump force, interval
Announce messages at start and end
flyingsubs: Submarines fly through the air on shift
Air torpedoes with cooldown and custom speed
Tunable thrust, pitch, turn, hover damping
happybee: Adds Bee Happy button to Beehive UI
Satisfies bees in the hive being looted
Periodic check interval for hive state
instanthelistartup: Instant engine start for all player helicopters
Optional upward jump impulse on mount
keywordlog: Logs chat messages containing configured keywords
Writes to local file and optional Discord webhook
Global and team chat monitoring toggles
Custom date format and log file name
loadedturrets: Per-player saved weapon and ammo loadouts
UI browser for weapon selection with paging
maxarmorcraft: Forces maximum armor insert slots on attire
Legacy per-item overrides for admin tier
Apply on craft and on item added to container
myboat: Spawn and fetch boats and subs via chat commands
Rowboat, RHIB, kayak, motorrowboat, solo/duo sub
Per-vehicle cooldown, fuel, and spawn distance
nocratefire: Removes or shortens napalm fire on heli and Bradley crates
Tracks multiple concurrent crates with timeout
Customizable crate and fire prefab lists
playerlog: Logs connects, disconnects, and session durations
Admins can watch live via console stream
Per-player join counter persisted to disk
sharkbaitcrate: Ultra-light ocean crate event with shark escort
Works on custom maps with configurable water level
Configurable shark count, depth, and radius
Optional map marker with custom radius
superammo: Configurable NPC prefab list for affected targets
teamid: Lightweight team inspector by team ID or player
Chat and console commands for team or all-teams report
treeremover: Toggleable right-click tree and ore-node remover
Configurable click cooldown and raycast layers
neighborhoodwatch: PvP kills logged with weapon, distance, bodypart
Unauthorized loot, door, and deployable access alerts
Raid tracking for C4, rockets, satchels, MLRS, fire
Color-coded Discord embeds per alert type
